items.title: Optimize Title Tags and Meta Descriptions for Better CTR
items.description: Rewrite title tags for top-ranking pages to include compelling value propositions and emotional triggers. Focus on aged lead pages ranking 8-11 with titles like 'Get High-Converting Aged IUL Leads - Same Day Delivery' instead of generic titles. A/B test meta descriptions with specific benefits and urgency.
items.expectedImpact: Increase CTR from 0.15% to 0.25-0.35%, potentially doubling organic traffic

items.title: Create Comprehensive IUL Lead Buying Guide
items.description: Develop a pillar page targeting 'how to buy IUL leads' that consolidates all IUL-related content. Include comparison tables, pricing guides, vendor reviews, and conversion tips. Link all existing IUL pages to this comprehensive resource.
items.expectedImpact: Capture more long-tail IUL queries and increase average session duration by 30-40%

items.title: Capitalize on IUL Leads Search Momentum
items.description: Create comprehensive IUL lead buying guides, comparison charts, and vendor reviews targeting 'aged IUL leads' and related queries. Add internal linking from the high-performing IUL leads page to related content. Develop FAQ sections addressing common IUL lead concerns.
items.expectedImpact: Could increase organic clicks by 200-300% given current strong position 6.8 ranking

items.title: Optimize Homepage for Lead Generation
items.description: Since homepage receives 71 views (58% of total), add clear lead magnets, email capture forms, and prominent calls-to-action for lead buying guides. Create personalized pathways for different sales professional types (insurance, solar, mortgage).
items.expectedImpact: Could improve conversion rate by 25-40% given high direct traffic volume

items.title: Implement Internal Linking Strategy for Lead Lifecycle Content
items.description: Create topic clusters around lead management, sales processes, and CRM systems. Add contextual internal links between related pages like lead lifecycle management (ranking position 3.7) and CRM comparison pages to distribute link equity and improve user flow.
items.expectedImpact: Reduce bounce rate to 60% and increase pages per session by 25%

items.title: Develop Aged Lead Pricing Calculator Tool
items.description: Build an interactive calculator that helps users estimate ROI on aged leads based on close rates, lead age, and industry. Target the query 'aged lead pricing guide' where you already rank well (position 4.9).
items.expectedImpact: Increase engagement rate to 45% and generate 20-30 new backlinks from industry sites

items.title: Expand Customer Journey Content Hub
items.description: The customer journey page shows perfect engagement (42 views, 42 users). Create a content series around B2C sales processes, lead nurturing stages, and conversion optimization specifically for internet leads.
items.expectedImpact: Could increase page views per session by 30-50% and extend session duration

items.title: Develop CRM System Content Strategy
items.description: Multiple CRM-related queries show strong impressions but low clicks. Create comparison guides, implementation checklists, and ROI calculators for CRM systems tailored to lead-based sales teams.
items.expectedImpact: Could capture 15-20 additional organic clicks monthly from CRM queries

items.title: Implement Email Capture for Direct Traffic
items.description: With 91 direct sessions indicating strong brand awareness, implement exit-intent popups, content upgrades, and newsletter signups to capture this engaged audience for nurturing.
items.expectedImpact: Could build email list by 20-30 subscribers weekly from direct traffic

items.title: Optimize for Voice Search and AI Queries
items.description: Add FAQ sections targeting conversational queries like 'what are the best aged insurance leads' and 'how much do IUL leads cost'. Structure content to answer specific questions that AI tools and voice assistants can easily extract.
items.expectedImpact: Capture 15-20% more traffic from AI referrals and voice search queries

items.title: Optimize Contact Page for Lead Generation
items.description: Contact page receives 41 views but may not be optimized for lead generation. Add consultation booking, lead audit offers, or free resources to convert information-seekers into leads.
items.expectedImpact: Could generate 5-10 additional qualified leads monthly
